declared_losses: No live provider calls exercised — comparison is structural/protocol-level only, not empirical against a running provider.
Single-cycle boundary note — no multi-cycle trend data available to assess append-only degradation over repeated wakes.
parsed.work_plan: 1) Confirm that the dry event-loop row provides sufficient lifecycle visibility (scheduled→claimed→completed) for an append-only comparison. 2) Verify the restart frontier preserves carried state, ensuring no inference advantage over append-only. 3) Note that the v1 harness is deterministic and makes no live calls, so the comparison is structural rather than empirical. 4) Issue the determination: whether this evidence supports proceeding to an append-only non-inferiority comparison or whether a declared limitation blocks it.
